steps.title: Infer the boundary idea
steps.content: The examples show artists blending Indigenous music with electronic music and R&B. That means the blank should describe artists refusing to keep Indigenous music separate from other musical styles.

steps.title: Match the verb
steps.content: Choice B would mean hiding the distinctions, but the examples openly mix styles. Choice C would mean substituting one style for another, but the artists combine styles. Choice D would mean following or maintaining distinctions, the opposite of what the examples show. The remaining word means refusing to accept those boundaries. The answer is A.
